Shameless Snacks Weekly Paid-Acquisition Report

Week: 2026-06-22 to 2026-06-28

Source: ejam-dwh.production.creative_dashboard

Scope: first-order paid-acquisition only. Not full P&L, no subscription LTV.

‚ñæ
TL;DR
Spend $78.7K, revenue $69.1K, ROAS 0.88, cmROAS 0.57, contribution margin -$33.7K. Every dollar spent returns 57 cents of gross profit after COGS -- break-even is 1.0 cmROAS (requires first-order ROAS ~1.54).
WoW improvement, not recovery. Spend down 8.4%, loss narrowed $5.8K (-14.7%). ROAS +6pts WoW, cmROAS +0.03. Trend is the right direction but still deep in the red.
vs 4-wk baseline: materially better. 4-wk avg cmROAS was 0.50, contrib margin -$42.5K/wk. We're running $8.8K/wk less in losses. Revenue-per-order has improved; CPA dropped from $101.69 avg to $86.15.
SH-9428 (HealthGLP1) is the biggest cash fire: $11.3K spend, cmROAS 0.49, -$5.7K contrib. KILL or deep budget cut now. -- KILL SH-9428
SH-16142 and SH-16180 are the closest things to working concepts (cmROAS 0.97 and 0.85 respectively). trw-gifts-it2-vp is the only LP with a clean funnel (41% LP-to-ATC, 13.4% ATC-to-order, $64 CPA). -- SCALE-BUDGET on those two concepts into trw-gifts-it2-vp.
Unmapped ad spend = $39.4K last week (50% of total). No ClickUp task link, no creative visibility. This is the single biggest process action needed.

Shameless Snacks Weekly Paid-Acquisition Report

Week: 2026-06-22 to 2026-06-28

Source: ejam-dwh.production.creative_dashboard

Scope: first-order paid-acquisition only. Not full P&L, no subscription LTV.

‚ñæ
TL;DR
Spend $78.7K, revenue $69.1K, ROAS 0.88, cmROAS 0.57, contribution margin -$33.7K. Every dollar spent returns 57 cents of gross profit after COGS -- break-even is 1.0 cmROAS (requires first-order ROAS ~1.54).
WoW improvement, not recovery. Spend down 8.4%, loss narrowed $5.8K (-14.7%). ROAS +6pts WoW, cmROAS +0.03. Trend is the right direction but still deep in the red.
vs 4-wk baseline: materially better. 4-wk avg cmROAS was 0.50, contrib margin -$42.5K/wk. We're running $8.8K/wk less in losses. Revenue-per-order has improved; CPA dropped from $101.69 avg to $86.15.
SH-9428 (HealthGLP1) is the biggest cash fire: $11.3K spend, cmROAS 0.49, -$5.7K contrib. KILL or deep budget cut now. -- KILL SH-9428
SH-16142 and SH-16180 are the closest things to working concepts (cmROAS 0.97 and 0.85 respectively). trw-gifts-it2-vp is the only LP with a clean funnel (41% LP-to-ATC, 13.4% ATC-to-order, $64 CPA). -- SCALE-BUDGET on those two concepts into trw-gifts-it2-vp.
Unmapped ad spend = $39.4K last week (50% of total). No ClickUp task link, no creative visibility. This is the single biggest process action needed.
